title: crotalaria agatiflora subsp. imperialis
intro: Crotalaria agatiflora subsp. imperialis, also known as the 'Empire Rattlebox', is a plant species within the pea family Fabaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria agatiflora subsp. imperialis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and boils. In traditional herbal medicine, Crotalaria agatiflora subsp. imperialis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
